assumptions: scan-derived fit context can be routed into CAD-ready intake
UX should send structured sizing and recommendation context
risks: fit context may be too vague for CAD intake
recommendation context may be confused with geometry rules
next_required_validation: Hermes review before runtime routing activation
primary_user_goal: Route fit and sizing context from UX into CAD-ready design intake.
ux_recommendation: Send structured fit, sizing, and recommendation context into Z-CAD intake only.
next_design_step: Convert fit, sizing, and product-selection context into CAD-ready intake packets for design preparation.
fit_context: Estimated fit profile from scan and selected user goal.
sizing_context: Sizing-related intake from scan and recommendation stage.
recommendation_context: Recommended product path and fit-summary context.
design_intent: Prepare structured intake for CAD-side geometry interpretation.
